title: Cash-Out Refi: Debt Consolidation
summary: Borrower wants cash out but is worried about rate, payment, and restarting the loan.
win_condition: Book a full application or consultation with permission to review numbers.

borrower.name: Michelle Torres
borrower.personality: Polite, skeptical, guarded until trust is built
borrower.motivation: Pay off credit cards and lower total monthly debt burden
objections: I don't want to restart my loan
I need to talk to my husband

title: HELOC Shopper Comparing Banks
summary: Borrower thinks a HELOC is automatically better than a cash-out refinance.
win_condition: Get borrower to compare options side-by-side instead of judging only APR.

borrower.name: David Kim
borrower.motivation: Home improvements and paying off a few high-interest cards
objections: My bank said a HELOC is cheaper
I don't want to touch my first mortgage
Can you just email me numbers?

title: VA Cash-Out: Payment Relief
summary: Veteran borrower needs payment relief but is concerned about fees and trust.
win_condition: Earn enough trust to continue with a VA cash-out review and set a follow-up.

borrower.name: Robert Hayes
borrower.motivation: Reduce monthly pressure and consolidate debt
objections: I've been burned by lenders before
I don't want my payment to jump
